commands.review_summary:
This PR clears `lastError` and `chatError` in `ui/src/ui/app.ts` when Talk reports a non-error status.

PR surface: Source +3. Total +3 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: seed `lastError`/`chatError` with a stale Talk error, retry Talk successfully, and current main keeps rendering `state.lastError` because the Talk callback only writes errors. I did not run a live browser reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real Control UI proof plus normal maintainer review; an automated repair lane cannot prove the contributor's real setup.
